DECLARATION OF CHARLES A. LUCERO ISO PETITIONER'S PETITION FOR ORDER RELIEVING HER FROM GOVERNMENT SECTION CODE SECTION 945.4 (TRANSACTION ID # 77005411) FILED BY PETITIONER CASTANON, BERTHA

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER BERTHA CASTANON'S HEARING FOR PETITION FOR ORDER RELIEVING HER FROM GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 945.4 THE UNOPPOSED PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM THE PROVISIONS OF GOVERNMENT CODE, SECTION 945.4, IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Order Relieving Her From Government Code Section 945.4
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER BERTHA CASTANON Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Order Relieving Her From Government Code Section 945.4

The unopposed petition for relief from the provisions of Government Code, section 945.4, is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
